business_problem: Tmall and Tmall Global—Alibaba's flagship e-commerce platforms and the first stop in China for many international brands—needed highly-stable, highly-scalable, secure global infrastructure to support "New Retail," handle massive Double 11 shopping traffic, deliver data middleware for personalization and chatbots, and protect over one million brands and millions of shoppers.
solution_summary: Tmall orchestrates the world's largest e-commerce platform serving 1 million+ brands and millions of consumers through Alibaba Cloud's secure, scalable infrastructure optimized for peak traffic events like Double 11, processing 325,000 orders per second. The platform ingests real-time transaction data through Data Middleware, enabling dynamic recommender systems and AI-powered customer service chatbots personalized to each brand and customer journey phase. Web Application Firewall and Anti-DDoS protection secure the transaction layer, while backend IaaS infrastructure ensures 24/7 availability and merchant service continuity. Emerging VR/AR capabilities enable immersive shopping experiences.
business_outcome: Tmall sustained record Double 11 throughput—Alibaba Cloud's system processed 325,000 orders per second, generating $25 billion+ in 24 hours—while protecting one million+ brands and powering customizable customer-service chatbots and New Retail VR/AR experiences.
metrics: 325,000 orders per second processed during Double 11 peaks
$25 billion USD generated in 24 hours during Double 11
architecture_clues: Data middleware for consumer-data tracking and recommender systems
WAF + Anti-DDoS Pro + intrusion prevention as standard security stack
evidence_quotes: During Double 11 peaks, Alibaba Cloud's system processed 325 thousand orders per a second which generated over 25 billion USD in 24 hours just last year.

For Tmall, one of the most important products when it comes to Cloud is security. Alibaba Cloud offers Tmall a variety of security solutions, including anti-DDoS protection, security monitoring and intrusion prevention, and web application firewall (WAF).

solution_components.name: Alibaba Cloud IaaS
solution_components.role: Foundational compute and storage infrastructure handling high-performance e-commerce at massive scale

solution_components.name: Data Middleware
solution_components.role: Real-time data processing enabling dynamic recommendations, chatbots, and consumer insights

solution_components.name: Web Application Firewall
solution_components.role: Application-layer security protecting transaction endpoints and payment processing

solution_components.name: Anti-DDoS Pro
solution_components.role: Network-layer DDoS protection ensuring platform availability during traffic spikes

data_flow: Consumer transactions → load balancing → IaaS backend processing → data middleware for analytics → recommendations and customer engagement
